MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF) 
Base with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 research files. The guide includes several ways for users to quickly
